description: kamal-style deploy config — SSH and Docker, no platform lock-in
input:
# config/deploy.yml
service: hey
image: 37signals/hey

servers:
  web:
    hosts:
      - 192.168.1.10
      - 192.168.1.11
    options:
      network: private

registry:
  server: registry.37signals.com
  username: deploy
  password:
    - KAMAL_REGISTRY_PASSWORD
